subgoals.description: Research and select a suitable Edinburgh venue, gathering key details such as location, capacity, amenities, and pricing.
subgoals.success_criterion: A confirmed venue with all required details documented in a structured format.

subgoals.description: Draft the flyer content using the selected venue's details, including event title, venue features, and contact information.
subgoals.success_criterion: A complete flyer draft with all necessary sections and accurate venue information.
